history.description: """What's all that stuff weigh?"" – a popular question for Haddam firefighters, after ""What does that do?"" and ""Why are your fire trucks yellow?"" Depending on what a firefighter is carrying, all that extra gear can weigh more than 70 pounds. While most firefighters weigh ""none of your business,
